nasb.text: They covet fields and then seize them, And houses, and take them away. They rob a man and his house, A man and his inheritance.

esv.text: They covet fields and seize them, and houses, and take them away; they oppress a man and his house, a man and his inheritance.

cnv.text: 他們要田地，就去搶奪； 想要房屋，就去強取。 他們欺壓人和他的家眷， 取人和人的產業。

ccb.text: 他们贪图田地，就去霸占； 想要房屋，就去抢夺。 他们欺压人， 诈取别人的家园和产业。
